misconfig_patterns: API key exposed in Docker stdout logs
/dashboard web UI accessible without credentials even when REST API key is configured
Read-write and read-only API keys not distinguished

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include Qdrant-specific status structure; probe /dashboard for UI confirmation

deployment_tells: /health returns unauthenticated even with API key configured on REST
/dashboard web UI open in browser at :6333/dashboard
pivot_paths: GET /collections → collection list even with API key on REST (dashboard bypass)
GET /dashboard → full collection browser, vector count, payload fields
GET /openapi.json → enumerate all endpoints including collection management
